name: proxyllm-mcp
description: OpenAI-compatible LLM gateway: models, savings math, key provisioning, autonomous email-OTP signup
long_description: MCP server for ProxyLLM. Live model catalog, plan-savings calculator, routing-key introspection and provisioning, and an account signup flow an agent can complete autonomously (email OTP in, sk_ token out, HTTP 402 with a checkout link until a human activates the membership).

proxyllm_account_token.title: ProxyLLM account token
proxyllm_account_token.description: Optional sk_/rk_ account token for management tools
